form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 4th of 7 at Tabley on May 21 2023 over 4000m, 21 len behind Star Of Fruition with 71.5kg. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, second last in a small field at Chelmsford on March 7 over 1400m, 10 len behind Beagle Bay with 55kg at $15. Second-up 6th of 8 at this track on March 18 over 1400m, 15 len behind New Monarch carrying 60.5kg at $67. Looks tested again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at this track November 5 over 1400m, a head behind Fort Rock with 59kg at $4.30. On debut fourth of 10 at Leicester September 22 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Moving Shadow carrying 60.5kg at $4. Should be right in the finish.
